title: artanthe cassinoides
intro: Artanthe cassinoides, also known as the false heliotrope, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae. It is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa, and its leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Artanthe cassinoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, or used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
